info.english_meaning: to ridicule to insult to reach to go closer
info.hindI_arTa: doza lagAnA niMdA karanA samIpa jAnA yA AnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' pratyekaM nidinedyoH stAM nedate nedatItyuBe  kutsAyAM sannikarze vA  kUtsAmAtre tu nindati ' (Slo. 114) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ati vA etA vartraM nedanti' (tE0 saM0 1681) atinedanti atikrAmanti
